card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Coordinate mobile safe-area and browser layout behavior through one viewport, text-alignment, and input-coordinate contract instead of screenshot-specific offsets.
card.objective: Keep menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry visually balanced and make the rendered touch target agree with the user's physical touch across visual-viewport origin changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared UI text uses consistent optical centering and symmetric padding without bottom-biased empty space.
Touch input remains aligned when mobile browser chrome or safe-area origin changes without a width or height change.
Phone-sized menu, Options, play, and Pause surfaces pass route-aware bounds, overlap, and console proof.
Physical iPhone and installed-PWA evidence remains required before terminal completion.
discoveries: The production surface is serving the merged PR #78 layout and input-coordinate repair at the canonical alias.
At 390x844 the production play HUD and Pause control both occupy a 62px lane while the status text remains contained.
nextActions: Collect operator physical-iPhone screenshots for text padding, safe areas, menu, Options, play, and Pause.
Collect physical touch-alignment proof across mobile browser-chrome changes.
Retain installed-PWA and native browser-chrome/maximize acceptance work.
blockers: Physical-device post-deploy screenshots and touch proof remain operator-held.
evidence: Vercel production deployment dpl_2ZHL85A9uKeJJ1LXfdksMQxgXXrc is Ready and aliased to https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
Production 390x844 proof reported native 390x844 canvas geometry, zero overlap/offscreen violations, fitting status text, equal 62px status/Pause height, and zero browser warnings/errors.

entry.headline: Merged mobile UI repair is live in production and ready for physical-iPhone review
completed: Merged PR #78 to Mazer main as 993b8e5c68d59882c58cb2fb560b95bb980a4900.
Deployed the exact merge commit to Vercel production as dpl_2ZHL85A9uKeJJ1LXfdksMQxgXXrc.
Verified the canonical production alias at 390x844 with native canvas geometry, contained status text, matched HUD/Pause height, zero overlap/offscreen findings, and zero browser warnings/errors.
discovered: The production alias resolves the new hashed main bundle and the merged viewport/input contract.
next: Use operator iPhone screenshots to complete physical safe-area, text-padding, and touch-alignment review without ratcheting from emulation alone.
